features: ROBUST AND HIGH QUALITY COMPONENTS — our Braided Lightning cable leads are designed with premium materials to support internal wiring, ensuring superior durability and long life.
1.5M CABLE LENGTH — our Braided Lightning cable leads are 1.5m long, giving you that extra bit of comfort whenever you need it.
DOUBLE BRAIDED — our Braided Lightning cable leads are made with tough and durable two-shade nylon to be easily differentiated from your other cables.
TANGLE FREE — our Braided Lightning cable leads are designed to reduce the risk of the wire becoming tangled or damaged.
12 MONTH GUARANTEE — our Braided Lightning cable leads come with a 12 month guarantee so rest assured knowing this high quality product is backed up by our year long guarantee.
description: From the manufacturer Made For Apple (MFI) Simply Power Premium Edition products are MFI certified meaning the items are quality, compatibility and safety tested in accordance with Apple testing procedures. Simply Power Simply Power offer a range of in car charging products for the most popular phone brands. Durable high-quality phone leads available in a range of colours and 12v adaptors with optimised quick charge technology. The range can be broken down into premium and standard editions of both USB chargers and braided cables. Simply Power is proud to supply many leading retailers in the UK and overseas! Premium USB Chargers Quick Charge Technology Fast charging technology is becoming increasingly common in the latest phones. Quick charge powers devices faster than conventional charging allowing you to spend less time connected to outlets. Premium MFI Braided Cables All cables in the Premium Edition are MFI certified to ensure compatibility, durability and performance with Apple products. Standard USB Cables The standard range of cables offer solutions for apple lightening, micro usb and type c connections. The braided cables are super strong and available in a range of colours. Classic USB Chargers The classic cigarette to USB car charger is available as a single and double configuration in a range of colours.
